TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 4 jiyax 25 ka Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Burkina faso ta sayang o kiya ka Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 12 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© (kngkawas 1957 idas 4 diyax 25 mntuting) ka Seyjicya Burkina Faso, kndadax kngkawas 2015 ida ngala Soto Burkina Faso. Mniq kngkawas 1994 dhuq 1996 iyax cida ngalan Cori Burkina Faso, mniq kngkawas 2002 dhuq kngkawas 2012 cida ngalan Burkina Faso Kokomin Gikay Cusi. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u ngalan Mincu Mi Cinpu Taykay (CDP) Cusi uri, dhuq kngkawas 2014 mlatac Tang kiya. Mntna kngkawas, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa phiyu Jnmin Cinpu Undo Tang. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© mniq kngkawas 2015 idas 11 na kcka knbeyhing seyngkyo cida wada mbiyax mangal Soto Burkina Faso. Mniq kndusan niya seyji brah cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mntaxa Ginghangcya. Brah kngdusanśó©ŚĻī Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mntyting mniq Ouagadougou, kiya ka sotu Burkina Faso. Mnhdu pyasan lxayan kyoiku CPS (Patas Pnsdhuwan Mnhdu Muyas Pyasan Tutiping) daw, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u musa muyas mniq Ouagadougou na 1 Pyasan Cinging Pyasan Sweyweyn Saint Jean-Baptiste de la Salle, mniq 1972 cida wada mangal Patas Pnsdhuwan BEPC (O Ci), iya u mniq kngkawas 1975 wada mangal Sweys Sweywey (A Ci). Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u lmutuc muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Dijon smluhay Keyjayswey, Kongsang Qmlahang, kiya u mniq kngkawas 1980 wada mangal Swos Sweywey. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u mniq France muyas iyax cida snturung qridin niya hiti Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© Sika Bella Kabor√©, ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1982 cida msturung mi wada tnquli 3 laqi. Kndusan qpahun niyaŤĀ∑ś•≠ÁĒüś∂Į Kndusan niya ginghangťäÄŤ°ĆÁĒüś∂Į Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa tuhuy tama niya Charles Bila Kabor√© (mnngalan Soto Maurice Yam√©ogo Seyhu Bucyo) mntna, mnniq Burkina Kwoci Ginghang mnngalan Ginghangcya. Mniq Thomas Sankara ngalan Soto iyax cida, och Marc Christian Kabor√© hiti balay daw wada mkala phyuwan Burkina Faso knbeyhing Ginghang mseykining niya. Kngkawas 1984 cida (27 knkawas) wada phyuwan BIB Sokanji, kiya mi ida ngalan qpahun niyi dhuq kngkawas 1989 idas 9 cida wada psdhuwan bukung seyhu. Kndusan niya seyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mnniq Burkina Faso seyhu ngalan Bucyo, Soto Tukubeycu Komung mi Kokomin Gikay Dayhyo. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u mniq kngkawas 1994 cida ngalan Congri. Kngkawas 1996 idas 2 Mincu Mi Cinpu Taykay phiyu cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u malax qpahun Congri, wada mburah Ccngtang na Tu1 Huku Soto, kiya mi Sotohu na Tukubeycu Komung. Kngkawas 2002 idas 6 diyax 6 cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa wada spuda seyngkyo mangal Burkina Faso Kokomin Gikay Cusi, lmutuc M√©l√©gu√© Maurice Traor√©. Snpeyyah CDP malax qpahun Kngkawas 2014 idas 1 diyax 6, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© tuhuy Mincu Tang Kcka duma niqan hhnhangan msupu pkla kari mlatac tang kiya. Rmngaw ka dsediq mnalax qpahun kiya, tang kiya u wisu dmuwi ini pnlngu mincu mi mqnaqah uuda muda naqah qpahun, kiya mi rmngaw kari ini sruwa knpriyux tang kiya na keykaku keyngpo plixun ka diyax iyax qpahun niya. SotoÁłĹÁĶĪ Mniq kngkawas 2015 idas 7 diyax 4 dhuq diyax 5 mniq Ouagadougou na Palais des Sports muda MPP taykay cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa wada balay bay sdhuwan ngalan kngkawas 2015 Burkina Faso Soto Seyngkyo na MPP hosweynjn. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa kngkawas 2015 idas 12 diyax 29 muda psdhu phiyu Soto Burkina Faso. Kiya mi psdhu phiyu keyjay sweycya Paul Kaba Thieba ka Congri. Mnngalan Seyningbu Bucyo na Jean-Claude Bouda mniq kngkawas 2017 idas 2 diyax20 cida wada psdhuwan rmirih Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© ngalan kwohwangbu Bucyo. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 11 diyax 22 kcka knbeyhing seyngkyo cida wada mangal 57.74% hyo mntxal lmutuc mangal Soto dungan.
S.PHON: = …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan bu…ĺkina *aso ta sajaŇč o kija ka …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč) ka s…ô…üi ¶ja bu…ĺkina *aso, kndadax kŇčkawas **** ida Ňčala soto bu…ĺkina *aso. mniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq **** ijax ¶ida Ňčalan ¶o…ĺi bu…ĺkina *aso, mniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida Ňčalan bu…ĺkina *aso kokomin gikaj ¶usi. …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* u Ňčalan min ¶u mi ¶inpu tajkaj ( ¶dp) ¶usi u…ĺi, dńßuq kŇčkawas **** mlata ¶ taŇč kija. mntna kŇčkawas, …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* pa pńßiju …ünmin ¶inpu undo taŇč. …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** na k ¶ka knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida wada mbijax maŇčal soto bu…ĺkina *aso. mniq kndusan nija s…ô…üi b…ĺańß ¶ida, …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* pa mntaxa giŇčńßaŇč ¶ja. b…ĺańß kŇčdusan** …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* pa mntjtiŇč mniq ouagadougou, kija ka sotu bu…ĺkina *aso. mnńßdu pjasan lxajan kjoiku ¶ps (patas pnsdńßuwan mnńßdu mujas pjasan tutipiŇč) daw, …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* u musa mujas mniq ouagadougou na * pjasan ¶iŇčiŇč pjasan sw…ôw…ôn saint …ü…ôan-baptist…ô d…ô la sall…ô, mniq **** ¶ida wada maŇčal patas pnsdńßuwan b…ôp ¶ (o ¶i), ija u mniq kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal sw…ôs sw…ôw…ô (a ¶i). …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* u lmutu ¶ mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč di…üon smluńßaj k…ô…üajsw…ô, koŇčsaŇč qmlańßaŇč, kija u mniq kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal swos sw…ôw…ô. …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* u mniq *…ĺan ¶…ô mujas ijax ¶ida sntu…ĺuŇč q…ĺidin nija ńßiti …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* sika b…ôlla kabo…ĺ*, ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida mstu…ĺuŇč mi wada tnquli * laqi. kndusan qpańßun nija**** kndusan nija giŇčńßaŇč**** …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* pa tuńßuj tama nija ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs bila kabo…ĺ* (mnŇčalan soto mau…ĺi ¶…ô jam*ogo s…ôńßu bu ¶jo) mntna, mnniq bu…ĺkina kwo ¶i giŇčńßaŇč mnŇčalan giŇčńßaŇč ¶ja. mniq tńßomas sanka…ĺa Ňčalan soto ijax ¶ida, o ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* ńßiti balaj daw wada mkala pńßjuwan bu…ĺkina *aso knb…ôńßiŇč giŇčńßaŇč ms…ôkiniŇč nija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida (** knkawas) wada pńßjuwan bib sokan…üi, kija mi ida Ňčalan qpańßun niji dńßuq kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida wada psdńßuwan bukuŇč s…ôńßu. kndusan nija s…ô…üi**** …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* pa mnniq bu…ĺkina *aso s…ôńßu Ňčalan bu ¶jo, soto tukub…ô ¶u komuŇč mi kokomin gikaj dajńßjo. …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* u mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * min ¶u mi ¶inpu tajkaj pńßiju ¶ida, …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* u malax qpańßun ¶oŇč…ĺi, wada mbu…ĺańß ¶ ¶ŇčtaŇč na tu* ńßuku soto, kija mi sotońßu na tukub…ô ¶u komuŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* pa wada spuda s…ôŇčkjo maŇčal bu…ĺkina *aso kokomin gikaj ¶usi, lmutu ¶ m*l*gu* mau…ĺi ¶…ô t…ĺao…ĺ*. snp…ôjańß ¶dp malax qpańßun kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, …ĺo ¶ńß ma…ĺ ¶ ¶ńß…ĺistian kabo…ĺ* tuńßuj min ¶u taŇč k ¶ka duma niqan ńßńßnńßaŇčan msupu pkla ka…ĺi mlata ¶ taŇč kija. …ĺmŇčaw ka ds…ôdiq mnalax qpańßun kija, taŇč kija u wisu dmuwi ini pnlŇču min ¶u mi mqnaqańß uuda muda naqańß qpańßun, kija mi …ĺmŇčaw ka…ĺi ini s…ĺuwa knp…ĺijux taŇč kija na k…ôkaku k…ôŇčpo plixun ka dijax ijax qpańßun nija. soto** mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * dńßuq dijax * mniq ouagadougou na palais d…ôs spo…ĺts muda mpp ¶ida wada maŇčal **.**% ńßjo mntxal lmutu ¶ maŇčal soto duŇčan.
S.FORM: = Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 4 jiyax 25 ka Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Burkina faso ta sayang o kiya ka Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 12 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© (kngkawas 1957 idas 4 diyax 25 mntuting) ka Seyjicya Burkina Faso, kndadax kngkawas 2015 ida ngala Soto Burkina Faso. Mniq kngkawas 1994 dhuq 1996 iyax cida ngalan Cori Burkina Faso, mniq kngkawas 2002 dhuq kngkawas 2012 cida ngalan Burkina Faso Kokomin Gikay Cusi. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u ngalan Mincu Mi Cinpu Taykay (CDP) Cusi uri, dhuq kngkawas 2014 mlatac Tang kiya. Mntna kngkawas, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa phiyu Jnmin Cinpu Undo Tang. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© mniq kngkawas 2015 idas 11 na kcka knbeyhing seyngkyo cida wada mbiyax mangal Soto Burkina Faso. Mniq kndusan niya seyji brah cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mntaxa Ginghangcya. Brah kngdusanśó©ŚĻī Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mntyting mniq Ouagadougou, kiya ka sotu Burkina Faso. Mnhdu pyasan lxayan kyoiku CPS (Patas Pnsdhuwan Mnhdu Muyas Pyasan Tutiping) daw, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u musa muyas mniq Ouagadougou na 1 Pyasan Cinging Pyasan Sweyweyn Saint Jean-Baptiste de la Salle, mniq 1972 cida wada mangal Patas Pnsdhuwan BEPC (O Ci), iya u mniq kngkawas 1975 wada mangal Sweys Sweywey (A Ci). Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u lmutuc muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Dijon smluhay Keyjayswey, Kongsang Qmlahang, kiya u mniq kngkawas 1980 wada mangal Swos Sweywey. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u mniq France muyas iyax cida snturung qridin niya hiti Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© Sika Bella Kabor√©, ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1982 cida msturung mi wada tnquli 3 laqi. Kndusan qpahun niyaŤĀ∑ś•≠ÁĒüś∂Į Kndusan niya ginghangťäÄŤ°ĆÁĒüś∂Į Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa tuhuy tama niya Charles Bila Kabor√© (mnngalan Soto Maurice Yam√©ogo Seyhu Bucyo) mntna, mnniq Burkina Kwoci Ginghang mnngalan Ginghangcya. Mniq Thomas Sankara ngalan Soto iyax cida, och Marc Christian Kabor√© hiti balay daw wada mkala phyuwan Burkina Faso knbeyhing Ginghang mseykining niya. Kngkawas 1984 cida (27 knkawas) wada phyuwan BIB Sokanji, kiya mi ida ngalan qpahun niyi dhuq kngkawas 1989 idas 9 cida wada psdhuwan bukung seyhu. Kndusan niya seyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mnniq Burkina Faso seyhu ngalan Bucyo, Soto Tukubeycu Komung mi Kokomin Gikay Dayhyo. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u mniq kngkawas 1994 cida ngalan Congri. Kngkawas 1996 idas 2 Mincu Mi Cinpu Taykay phiyu cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© u malax qpahun Congri, wada mburah Ccngtang na Tu1 Huku Soto, kiya mi Sotohu na Tukubeycu Komung. Kngkawas 2002 idas 6 diyax 6 cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa wada spuda seyngkyo mangal Burkina Faso Kokomin Gikay Cusi, lmutuc M√©l√©gu√© Maurice Traor√©. Snpeyyah CDP malax qpahun Kngkawas 2014 idas 1 diyax 6, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© tuhuy Mincu Tang Kcka duma niqan hhnhangan msupu pkla kari mlatac tang kiya. Rmngaw ka dsediq mnalax qpahun kiya, tang kiya u wisu dmuwi ini pnlngu mincu mi mqnaqah uuda muda naqah qpahun, kiya mi rmngaw kari ini sruwa knpriyux tang kiya na keykaku keyngpo plixun ka diyax iyax qpahun niya. SotoÁłĹÁĶĪ Mniq kngkawas 2015 idas 7 diyax 4 dhuq diyax 5 mniq Ouagadougou na Palais des Sports muda MPP taykay cida, Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa wada balay bay sdhuwan ngalan kngkawas 2015 Burkina Faso Soto Seyngkyo na MPP hosweynjn. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa kngkawas 2015 idas 12 diyax 29 muda psdhu phiyu Soto Burkina Faso. Kiya mi psdhu phiyu keyjay sweycya Paul Kaba Thieba ka Congri. Mnngalan Seyningbu Bucyo na Jean-Claude Bouda mniq kngkawas 2017 idas 2 diyax20 cida wada psdhuwan rmirih Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© ngalan kwohwangbu Bucyo. Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© pa mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 11 diyax 22 kcka knbeyhing seyngkyo cida wada mangal 57.74% hyo mntxal lmutuc mangal Soto dungan.
